text: The subject is located in a neighborhood on the eastside of Washington, IL. It is a single family detached bungalow designed house as Unit #1 with a raised ranch accessory unit in the rear of the parcel acting as Unit #2. It conforms to most other existing homes in the neighborhood in design, quality, and condition. The area is within a mile of schools, recreation, shopping, and centers of employment. The subject neighborhood is bordered to the North by Cruger Rd, to the South by Peoria St, to the East by Diebel Rd, and to the West by Cummings Ln.
